debug_info.goal:
μ : ℝ
v p : NNReal
t : ℝ
S : Set ℝ := Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v)
⊢ ∀ x ∈ S, |Real.exp (t * x)| ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v))

proof:
intro x hx; rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
        have hx_abs : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := abs_le.mpr
          ⟨by linarith [neg_abs_le μ, (mem_Icc.mp hx).1], by linarith [le_abs_self μ, (mem_Icc.mp hx).2]⟩
        calc t * x ≤ |t * x| := le_abs_self _
          _ = |t| * |x| := abs_mul _ _
          _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hx_abs (abs_nonneg t)
failed_attempts: intro x hx; rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]; refine (le_abs_self _).trans ?_; rw [abs_mul]; refine mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left ?_ (abs_nonneg t); have : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩; linarith [abs_add (x - μ) μ, sub_add_cancel x μ]

intro x hx
        rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
        apply le_trans (le_abs_self _)
        rw [abs_mul]
        exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.1, neg_le_abs_self μ, Real.sqrt_nonneg v], by linarith [hx.2, le_abs_self μ, Real.sqrt_nonneg v]⟩) (abs_nonneg t)

intro x hx
        rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
        refine (le_abs_self _).trans (abs_mul t x ▸ mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left ?_ (abs_nonneg t))
        rw [mem_Icc] at hx
        exact abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [neg_le_abs_self μ], by linarith [le_abs_self μ]⟩

sub_add_cancel x μ, add_comm]
        exact (abs_add μ (x - μ)).trans (add_le_add_left (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.1], by linarith [hx.2]⟩) |μ|)

intro x hx
        rw [Real.abs_exp]
        refine Real.exp_le_exp.mpr (le_trans (le_abs_self _) ?_)
        rw [abs_mul]
        gcongr
        exact abs_le.mpr ⟨(sub_le_sub_right (neg_abs_le μ) _).trans hx.1, hx.2.trans (add_le_add_right (le_abs_self μ) _)⟩

intro x hx
      rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
      calc
        t * x ≤ |t * x| := le_abs_self _
        _ = |t| * |x| := abs_mul _ _
        _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
          gcongr
          rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> linarith [mem_Icc.mp hx, neg_abs_le μ, le_abs_self μ]

intro x hx
        rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
        rw [mem_Icc] at hx
        have : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> linarith
        calc
          t * x ≤ |t * x| := le_abs_self (t * x)
          _ = |t| * |x| := abs_mul t x
          _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left this (abs_nonneg t)

sub_add_cancel x μ, add_comm]
        exact (abs_add μ (x - μ)).trans (add_le_add_left (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [mem_Icc.1 hx], by linarith [mem_Icc.1 hx]⟩) |μ|)

intro x hx; rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]; apply le_trans (le_abs_self _)
        rw [abs_mul]; exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.1, neg_le_abs_self μ],
          by linarith [hx.2, le_abs_self μ]⟩) (abs_nonneg t)

sub_add_cancel x μ, add_comm]
            exact (abs_add μ (x - μ)).trans (add_le_add_left (abs_sub_le_iff.mpr hx) _)) (abs_nonneg t)

sub_add_cancel x μ, add_comm]
            exact (abs_add μ (x - μ)).trans (add_le_add_left (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.1], by linarith [hx.2]⟩) _)) (abs_nonneg t)

intro x hx; rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]; exact (le_abs_self _).trans ((abs_mul t x).le.trans (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left ((abs_add μ (x - μ)).trans (add_le_add_left (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.1], by linarith [hx.2]⟩) |μ|)) (abs_nonneg t)))

intro x hx
      rw [abs_of_pos (Real.exp_pos _), Real.exp_le_exp]
      refine (le_abs_self (t * x)).trans (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left ?_ (abs_nonneg t))
      exact abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.2, le_abs_self μ], by linarith [hx.1, neg_le_abs μ]⟩

intro x hx; rw [abs_of_pos (Real.exp_pos _)]; refine Real.exp_le_exp.mpr ((le_abs_self _).trans (by
          rw [abs_mul]; exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left ((abs_add μ (x - μ)).trans
          (add_le_add_left (abs_sub_le_iff.mpr hx) _)) (abs_nonneg t)))

intro x hx
      rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
      calc t * x ≤ |t| * |x| := (le_abs_self _).trans (abs_mul ..).le
        _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
          gcongr
          rw [mem_Icc] at hx
          calc |x| = |x - μ + μ| := by rw [sub_add_cancel]
            _ ≤ |x - μ| + |μ| := abs_add ..
            _ ≤ 2 * √v + |μ| := add_le_add_right (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩) _
            _ = |μ| + 2 * √v := add_comm ..
sorry

intro x hx; rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
        calc
          t * x ≤ |t| * |x| := (le_abs_self _).trans_eq (abs_mul _ _)
          _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.1, neg_le_abs_self μ], by linarith [hx.2, le_abs_self μ]⟩) (abs_nonneg t)

intro x hx; rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
        refine (le_abs_self _).trans (by rw [abs_mul]; exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
          ((abs_add μ (x - μ)).trans (add_le_add_left (abs_sub_le_iff.mpr ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩) _)) (abs_nonneg t))
sorry

intro x hx; rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]; apply (le_abs_self _).trans
        rw [abs_mul, add_comm]; exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left ((abs_add (x - μ) μ).trans
          (add_le_add_right (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.1], by linarith [hx.2]⟩) _)) (abs_nonneg t)

intro x hx
        rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
        refine (le_abs_self _).trans ?_
        rw [abs_mul]
        gcongr
        rw [abs_le]
        constructor <;> linarith [hx, le_abs_self μ, neg_abs_le μ]

intro x hx; rw [Real.abs_exp]; refine Real.exp_le_exp.mpr (le_trans (le_abs_self _) ?_)
        rw [abs_mul, add_comm]; apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (abs_nonneg t)
        exact (abs_add_le μ (x - μ)).trans (add_le_add_left (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [(mem_Icc.1 hx).1], by linarith [(mem_Icc.1 hx).2]⟩) _)

intro x hx; rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]; apply (le_abs_self _).trans; rw [abs_mul]
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (abs_nonneg t)
        rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> linarith [hx.1, hx.2, le_abs_self μ, neg_le_abs_self μ]
sorry

intro x hx; rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
      calc
        t * x ≤ |t| * |x| := (abs_mul t x ▸ le_abs_self (t * x))
        _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.1, neg_le_abs_self μ], by linarith [hx.2, le_abs_self μ]⟩) (abs_nonneg t)
sub_add_cancel x μ]; exact (abs_add (x - μ) μ).trans (add_le_add_right (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩) _)
successful_attempts:
intro x hx; rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
        have hx_abs : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := abs_le.mpr
          ⟨by linarith [neg_abs_le μ, (mem_Icc.mp hx).1], by linarith [le_abs_self μ, (mem_Icc.mp hx).2]⟩
        calc t * x ≤ |t * x| := le_abs_self _
          _ = |t| * |x| := abs_mul _ _
          _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hx_abs (abs_nonneg t)

intro x hx
        rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
        calc t * x ≤ |t * x| := le_abs_self (t * x)
          _ = |t| * |x| := abs_mul t x
          _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.1, neg_abs_le μ],
            by linarith [hx.2, le_abs_self μ]⟩) (abs_nonneg t)

intro x hx
        rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
        refine (le_abs_self _).trans ?_
        rw [abs_mul]
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
        · exact abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.1, neg_abs_le μ], by linarith [hx.2, le_abs_self μ]⟩
        · apply abs_nonneg

intro x hx; rw [Real.abs_exp]; refine Real.exp_le_exp.mpr (le_trans (le_abs_self _) ?_); rw [abs_mul]; gcongr; exact abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.1, Real.sqrt_nonneg (v : ℝ), neg_le_abs μ], by linarith [hx.2, Real.sqrt_nonneg (v : ℝ), le_abs_self μ]⟩

intro x hx; rw [abs_of_pos (Real.exp_pos _), Real.exp_le_exp]
        refine (le_abs_self _).trans ?_
        rw [abs_mul]; exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.1, neg_abs_le μ, Real.sqrt_nonneg (v : ℝ)], by linarith [hx.2, le_abs_self μ, Real.sqrt_nonneg (v : ℝ)]⟩) (abs_nonneg t)

intro x hx; rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]; apply (le_abs_self _).trans
        rw [abs_mul]; exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (abs_le.mpr ⟨by linarith [hx.1, neg_abs_le μ, Real.sqrt_nonneg v],
          by linarith [hx.2, le_abs_self μ, Real.sqrt_nonneg v]⟩) (abs_nonneg t)
